required_preferences.fact: Completely eliminates coffee (including decaf) and strictly avoids all caffeine sources—consumes only water and approved herbal teas throughout the day while medical testing continues

supersedes.fact: Strictly limits coffee to a single morning cup—switches to decaf or herbal tea for the rest of the day to comply with dietary instructions for blood pressure control

required_preferences.fact: Now alternates weeknight school pickups with her partner, coordinating based on their son's math program schedule—never assumes full pickup responsibility alone during enrichment nights

supersedes.fact: Handles all school drop-offs and pickups on weekdays—never misses afternoon pickups unless her partner is available

required_preferences.fact: Keeps her phone on silent at home from 7pm onward—never replies to work messages after that time
Keeps book club gatherings strictly to every other month—never reschedules to a different cadence
Texts her close friend group daily but prefers voice calls with her partner in the evenings
Checks in daily with assisted living staff by phone or text to monitor her mother's well-being—never waits for weekly updates or for staff to reach out first

persona: A finance manager at a nonprofit organization with limited technical resources
